meta.name: Lean4Game Course Studio
meta.description: Automated lean4game course authoring pipeline with declarative quality gates. Converts 49 stub courses into complete, reviewed, playtested lean4game courses.
meta.author: lean4game-studio

hank.name: Initialize Pipeline State
hank.description: Create initial pipeline-state.json and catalog-progress.json if they don't exist.

command.run: test -f pipeline-state.json || echo '{"nextStep":"select-course","currentCourse":null,"currentWorld":null,"reviewRound":0,"coursesCompleted":[],"worldsCompleted":[],"reviewCycleCount":0}' > pipeline-state.json; test -f catalog-progress.json || echo '{"completed":[]}' > catalog-progress.json

hank.name: Main Course Production Pipeline
hank.description: Single flat loop with dispatch-based routing. The dispatch codon snapshots the active step to active-codon.txt at the start of each iteration. All other codons check active-codon.txt (not pipeline-state.json) to avoid state cascade within an iteration.

codons.name: Dispatch: Route to Active Codon
codons.description: Reads pipeline-state.json.nextStep and writes it to active-codon.txt. This snapshot prevents state cascade — all other codons check active-codon.txt which is written ONCE at the start of each iteration.

command.run: python3 -c "import json; s=json.load(open('pipeline-state.json')); open('active-codon.txt','w').write(s.get('nextStep','done'))" 2>/dev/null || echo done > active-codon.txt

codons.name: Select Next Course
codons.description: Pick the next stub course from the catalog, respecting prerequisites and priority ordering.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); [ "$ACTIVE" = "select-course" ] && echo RUN > should-run.txt || echo SKIP > should-run.txt

codons.name: Phase 1a: Coverage Mapping
codons.description: Build the 7-axis coverage map for the current course's mathematical content.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); [ "$ACTIVE" = "coverage-map" ] && echo RUN > should-run.txt || echo SKIP > should-run.txt

codons.name: Phase 1b: Course Architecture
codons.description: Design the world graph, granularity plan, inventory release plan, boss map, and transfer plan.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); [ "$ACTIVE" = "course-architect" ] && echo RUN > should-run.txt || echo SKIP > should-run.txt

codons.name: Phase 1c: Plan Review
codons.description: Review the course plan for scope completeness, coverage alignment, world graph coherence, proof-move coverage, and example planning.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); [ "$ACTIVE" = "plan-review" ] && echo RUN > should-run.txt || echo SKIP > should-run.txt

codons.name: Phase 1d: Plan Gate
codons.description: Quality gate for the course plan. Read-only — decides continue/done/abort.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); [ "$ACTIVE" = "plan-gate" ] && echo RUN > should-run.txt || echo SKIP > should-run.txt

codons.name: Phase 1e: Plan Fix
codons.description: Fix issues found in the plan review. Updates PLAN.md and coverage-map.md.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); [ "$ACTIVE" = "plan-fix" ] && echo RUN > should-run.txt || echo SKIP > should-run.txt

codons.name: Phase 2a: Author Next World
codons.description: Design and write a complete world: all levels, hints, boss, intro/conclusion, inventory changes, Game.lean updates.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); [ "$ACTIVE" = "author-world" ] && echo RUN > should-run.txt || echo SKIP > should-run.txt

codons.name: Phase 2b: Build and Fix
codons.description: Run lake build, read errors, fix them, rebuild. Up to 3 internal attempts.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); if [ "$ACTIVE" = "build" ]; then echo RUN > should-run.txt; lake build 2>&1 | tee build-log.txt; echo $? > build-exit-code.txt; else echo SKIP > should-run.txt; fi

codons.name: Phase 2c: Enrichment Review
codons.description: Find ambitious improvements: derivable results, missing examples, unnamed strategies, cross-world opportunities.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); [ "$ACTIVE" = "enrichment-review" ] && echo RUN > should-run.txt || echo SKIP > should-run.txt

codons.name: Phase 2d: Playtest Audit
codons.description: Red-team the world for coverage, granularity, recoverability, exploitability, and learner simulation.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); [ "$ACTIVE" = "playtest-audit" ] && echo RUN > should-run.txt || echo SKIP > should-run.txt

codons.name: Phase 2e: Review Gate
codons.description: THE CRITICAL CODON. Reads both review files, applies quality rubric, decides continue/done. Read-only — does not write code.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); [ "$ACTIVE" = "review-gate" ] && echo RUN > should-run.txt || echo SKIP > should-run.txt

codons.name: Phase 2f: Fix Issues
codons.description: Implement ALL fixes from both reviews. Never reject enrichment because 'too much work'. Rebuild after fixing.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); [ "$ACTIVE" = "fix-issues" ] && echo RUN > should-run.txt || echo SKIP > should-run.txt

codons.name: Phase 2g: Mark World Complete
codons.description: Update world-progress.json, archive review files, advance to next world or cross-world review.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); [ "$ACTIVE" = "mark-world" ] && echo RUN > should-run.txt || echo SKIP > should-run.txt

codons.name: Phase 3a: Cross-World Coverage Remap
codons.description: Re-map coverage across all completed worlds to check for drift, gaps, or redundancy.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); [ "$ACTIVE" = "cross-world-coverage" ] && echo RUN > should-run.txt || echo SKIP > should-run.txt

codons.name: Phase 3b: Cross-World Fix
codons.description: Fix cross-world issues found in the coverage remap. Rebuild.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); [ "$ACTIVE" = "cross-world-fix" ] && echo RUN > should-run.txt || echo SKIP > should-run.txt

codons.name: Phase 4: Mark Course Complete
codons.description: Commit, push, update catalog-progress.json. Advance to next course.

command.run: ACTIVE=$(cat active-codon.txt 2>/dev/null || echo none); [ "$ACTIVE" = "mark-course" ] && echo RUN > should-run.txt || echo SKIP > should-run.txt
